title: tephrosia mohrii
intro: Tephrosia mohrii, also known as Mohrii's horsefly tree or Horsefly bush, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia mohrii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia mohrii typically involve making infusions or decoctions from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
